title: 第二章：022 的占座书包

library_route_unlocked.text: System: Movement problem solved. Head to the Basic Library and find seat zero-two-two in the south section, second floor. Try not to break the controller on the way.
library_route_unlocked.subtitleZh: 系统：移动问题解决了。去基础图书馆二楼南区找 022。路上尽量别再把手柄弄坏。
library_route_unlocked.delivery: brisk mission briefing with a dry warning at the end

library_entered.text: System: Seven minutes. You took seven minutes from the dorm to the library. Ordinary speed, impeccable paperwork.
library_entered.subtitleZh: 系统：七分钟。你从寝室走到图书馆用了七分钟。速度普通，手续无可挑剔。
library_entered.delivery: bureaucratic timing report, deadpan final contrast

library_occupied_seat_found.text: System: This is zero-two-two. There is a backpack on the seat. It has been here longer than you, so the system currently trusts it more.
library_occupied_seat_found.subtitleZh: 系统：这里是 022。座位上有个书包。它待得比你久，所以系统目前更信任它。
library_occupied_seat_found.delivery: low, suspicious observation followed by calm institutional irony

cc98_occupation_post_opened.text: System: Twenty-three floors are enough for an investigation. You may read the five A-C-zero-one replies, but they carry no course credit.
cc98_occupation_post_opened.subtitleZh: 系统：二十三楼已经够调查了。那五条 ac01 可以看，但不计课程学分。
cc98_occupation_post_opened.delivery: quick forum scan, amused dismissal of the filler replies

library_catalog_match_found.text: System: Out of five books, you found the only useful one. Call number seven-five-five. Take it to the actual shelf.
library_catalog_match_found.subtitleZh: 系统：五本书里，你找到了唯一有用的一本。索书号 755。去真正的书架。
library_catalog_match_found.delivery: focused confirmation, deliberate call number, firm instruction

library_archived_rule_recovered.text: System: The old rule requires three proofs. The rule is old. The inconvenience is freshly issued.
library_archived_rule_recovered.subtitleZh: 系统：旧规则要求三份证明。规则很旧，麻烦刚刚签发。
library_archived_rule_recovered.delivery: slow document reading, dry emphasis on freshly issued

photo_bag_report_generated.text: System: Once you lowered the brightness, the photo finally admitted it was a backpack. Recognition report generated.
photo_bag_report_generated.subtitleZh: 系统：亮度降下来以后，照片终于承认那是个书包。识别报告已生成。
photo_bag_report_generated.delivery: understated amusement followed by a clean machine confirmation

library_bag_nonperson_proof_issued.text: System: Stamp complete. Officially, this backpack is currently not a person.
library_bag_nonperson_proof_issued.subtitleZh: 系统：盖章完成。按当前认定，这个书包暂时不是人。
library_bag_nonperson_proof_issued.delivery: mock-official certification, precise and completely serious

library_seat_receipt_recovered.text: System: The shift-right arrow is back on duty. The zero-two-two receipt is out, and the arrow survived.
library_seat_receipt_recovered.subtitleZh: 系统：右移箭头重新上岗。022 小票出来了，而且箭头没有损坏。
library_seat_receipt_recovered.delivery: crisp action report with a small relieved finish

tiyi_presence_proof_issued.text: System: Seven. Forty-seven. Three. ZJU Sports acknowledges that you visited the library through an adequately complicated process.
tiyi_presence_proof_issued.subtitleZh: 系统：七，四十七，三。浙大体艺确认你通过一套足够复杂的流程到过图书馆。
tiyi_presence_proof_issued.delivery: deliberate numeric recitation, formal administrative conclusion

cc98_top_ten_reached.text: System: Three valid B-D replies. The post is now number one. The truth has finally acquired sufficient traffic.
cc98_top_ten_reached.subtitleZh: 系统：三条有效 bd。帖子现在是十大第一。真相终于获得了足够流量。
cc98_top_ten_reached.delivery: restrained celebration, faster tempo, proud final sentence

library_seat_release_pass_issued.text: System: Seat-release PASS generated. It only works on the backpack at zero-two-two. Do not use it on your roommate.
library_seat_release_pass_issued.subtitleZh: 系统：清退 PASS 已生成。它只对 022 的书包有效，别拿去试你的室友。
library_seat_release_pass_issued.delivery: authoritative permit issuance, low dry warning

library_backpack_evicted.text: System: Backpack transferred to Lost and Found. Zero-two-two is open. Sit down before the system recalculates.
library_backpack_evicted.subtitleZh: 系统：书包已转交失物招领。022 空出来了。趁系统重新计算前坐下。
library_backpack_evicted.delivery: decisive enforcement report, urgent final command

library_friend_contacted.text: System: You found her. An attendance record was checked out by a book. Next step: find that book.
library_friend_contacted.subtitleZh: 系统：找到她了。一条签到记录被一本书借走了。下一步，找到那本书。
library_friend_contacted.delivery: quiet reveal, slower pace, unresolved final instruction

post.author: 二南临时读者
post.title: 【求助】022 的书包已经三天没眨眼了
post.body: 二楼南区 022 有个书包，离开三分钟回来还在。它是不是比我更像读者？

storyReplies.author: 二南临时读者
storyReplies.text: 022 有个书包，离开三分钟回来还在。纸条写着离开三分钟，回来时系统已经换人。

storyReplies.author: 入口记录员
storyReplies.text: 入馆记录能证明你什么时候到，但不能证明座位上的东西属于谁。

storyReplies.author: 索书号爱好者
storyReplies.quote: 回复 4 楼：入口记录只能证明到场
storyReplies.text: 旧版规则不在网上，在图书馆书架背面。搜‘三分钟离座法’。

storyReplies.author: 纸面支援专员
storyReplies.text: 先 bd 留言，再把配图放在这里。它只负责维持评论区队形，不负责证明任何事。
storyReplies.caption: bd

storyReplies.author: 热度维护员
storyReplies.text: 证据齐了记得 bd。座位系统不看草稿，只读取已经公示的材料。

storyReplies.author: 二南临时读者
storyReplies.text: 帖子进十大第一后，图书馆 App 会开放 022 恢复申请。旧申请统一挂在公示编号 47。

optionalAc01Replies.author: 前排先占楼
optionalAc01Replies.text: ac01，座位没占到，楼层总得先占一个。

optionalAc01Replies.author: 三分钟后再来
optionalAc01Replies.text: ac01。三分钟后回来看看这条回复有没有被别人预约。

optionalAc01Replies.author: 空气座位经销商
optionalAc01Replies.text: 前排出售空气座位，坐下即视为离开。ac01

optionalAc01Replies.author: 022考勤员
optionalAc01Replies.text: 022 的书包今天也全勤，我今天也……算了。ac01

optionalAc01Replies.author: 体艺凑数办
optionalAc01Replies.text: 公示编号 47，运动次数 47，建议书包报名体艺。ac01

texts: 蹲个后续，杯子已经替我接上电源了。
三分钟过去了，楼主和座位目前只回来一个。
证明材料先放这，万一下一楼正好带章。
书包连续三天到场，建议先给它发本学期全勤。

bdOptions.author: 022票据核对员
bdOptions.text: 规则有了，但 022 是不是你的？小票和公示可以互相核对。

bdOptions.author: 书包辩护律师
bdOptions.text: 书包连续三天到场，楼主只出现五分钟。我宣布书包胜诉。
bdOptions.rejection: 到场时长不能替代身份和座位凭证。

bdOptions.author: 路径表格复核员
bdOptions.text: 本人来过证明与座位小票时间一致，这条形成了访问链。

bdOptions.author: 二南空调观察员
bdOptions.text: bd。顺便问一下二南空调今天开了吗？
bdOptions.rejection: 这条成功参与了聊天，没有提供任何证据。

bdOptions.author: 物品人格审核台
bdOptions.text: 盖章报告已确认姓名、学号均为无，书包不具备占座主体资格。

catalogResults.title: 三分钟离座法及其例外
catalogResults.author: 馆内秩序编写组
catalogResults.location: 基础馆二楼南区 755 号书架背面
catalogResults.note: 本书不可借阅，因为借走过一次后规则失效了三天。

catalogResults.title: 三分钟离席法与若干例外
catalogResults.author: 间歇研究室
catalogResults.location: 基础馆四楼 B 区
catalogResults.note: 研究心理边界，不包含座位恢复条款。

catalogResults.title: 三分钟暂离法及其应用
catalogResults.author: 短时休息组
catalogResults.location: 基础馆三楼 G 区
catalogResults.note: 暂离计时器实践手册，没有 022 相关附件。

catalogResults.title: 三分钟起身法与边界情况
catalogResults.author: 边界观察组
catalogResults.location: 基础馆一楼 C 区
catalogResults.note: 讨论起身后的边界，不提供占座处理权限。

catalogResults.title: 三分钟空座法及其解释
catalogResults.author: 空位说明组
catalogResults.location: 基础馆五楼 G 区
catalogResults.note: 解释空座现象，不处理有书包的座位。

photo.result: 对象类型：书包；状态：长期占座；本人属性：不成立

dialogue022.speaker: 系统
dialogue022.text: 先别叙旧。能改签到记录吗？
查完再决定你要不要哭。
在图书馆，不能借的东西才比较少。

dialogue022.speaker: 玩家
dialogue022.text: 书借走了记录，还是记录借走了书？
